title: Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir
tagline: Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir, Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Shri Chamunda Devi Temple also known as Chamunda Nandikeshwar Dham is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, a form of Goddess Durga, located at 19 km away from Palampur t
overview.description: Shri Chamunda Devi Temple also known as Chamunda Nandikeshwar Dham is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, a form of Goddess Durga, located at 19 km away from Palampur town in Dharamshala Tehsil of Kangra district of the Northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. This is one of the most prominent temples in Himachal Pradesh and one of the most popular all over India. It is believed that whatever vow is prayed here manifests in reality. The much older Aadi Himani Chamunda which is also the original shrine, is situated at the hilltop, making it difficult for pilgrims to reach.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chamba, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Chamba is a town in the Chamba district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. According to the 2001 Indian census, Chamba has a population of 20,312.

topPlaces.name: Gopalpur Zoo
topPlaces.description: Gopalpur Zoo is situated in Gopalpur village, Kangra district, Himachal Pradesh in India, en route the Dharmshala – Palampur road. It is surrounded by Dhauladhar Range of the Himalayas.

topPlaces.name: Gopalpur, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Gopalpur is a village in Kangra district of Himachal Pradesh, India located near Palampur. There is also one branch school of the Tibetan Children's Village.

topPlaces.name: Sidhbari
topPlaces.description: Sidhbari is a suburb of Dharamshala town, situated in the foothills of Dhauladhar mountains, in Kangra district of the state of Himachal Pradesh, India. The Samadhi (final resting place) of Sri Chinmayananda is located here.

topPlaces.name: Aadi Himani Chamunda
topPlaces.description: Aadi Himani Chamunda is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, situated in Chandar Bhan, Jia in Kangra Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India, in the Himalayas.

topPlaces.name: Nagrota Bagwan
topPlaces.description: Nagrota Bagwan is a town and a municipal council in Kangra district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It is in the Kangra valley in the Dhauladhar Mountain Range.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kangra Airport (Gaggal), Dharamshala (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (148 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chamba, Himachal Pradesh, Gopalpur Zoo, Gopalpur, Himachal Pradesh, Sidhbari, Aadi Himani Chamunda.
